final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: presentation-cover
Asset type: pitch deck cover slide, horizontal layout
Primary request: title slide for GPT-5.5 domestic financing announcement, speaker Sam Altman
Scene/backdrop: minimalist tech conference stage backdrop with subtle Chinese design elements, gradient overlay
Subject: bold headline "GPT 5.5 正式发布" with speaker name "Sam Altman" and "OpenAI CEO" subtitle
Style/medium: corporate tech presentation design, modern Chinese startup aesthetic
Composition/framing: centered layout, title at upper half, speaker info at lower third, generous whitespace
Lighting/mood: clean professional lighting, confident and forward-looking atmosphere
Color palette: deep navy blue + gold accents + white text, Chinese tech startup color scheme
Materials/textures: smooth matte surface, subtle metallic gold highlights
Text (verbatim): "GPT 5.5 正式发布"
Constraints: must reflect Chinese domestic roadshow style, GP/funding presentation tone, bilingual elements acceptable
Avoid: cluttered layout, cartoonish graphics, Western-centric design language, excessive decorative patterns
